title: Split consignment: Hold changed to Non compliant creates Rejected <ref>R child CHEDs after valid ched is generated on partial checks
outcome: An importer creates and submits a 3-commodity CHED-PP notification, an inspector then records PHSI documentary/identity/physical checks per commodity (commodity-1 all Compliant, commodities 2 and 3 all Hold), the notification is split into a Valid child CHED plus held commodities, and a subsequent change of commodity-2's document check from Hold to Non compliant produces a Rejected 'R'-suffixed child CHED — the final assertion failed because the Rejected tab contained commodity 14019000 rather than the expected 06042090.

errors.receivedSummary: Rejected tab rendered child CHED 'CHEDPP.GB.2026.1526027R' containing Commodity code 14019000, Description 'Other', Genus (and species) 'Acer macrophyllum', EPPO code 'ACRMA', empty Class and Variety, with Document check NON COMPLIANT, Identity check COMPLIANT, Physical check COMPLIANT.
